## Scope check

kernledger is intentionally narrow. Before opening, please confirm:

- [ ] This is **not** a stealth feature (see README § "What this tool is NOT").
- [ ] This does **not** add free-text identity / case flags (see
      `docs/forensic-considerations.md` § 5).
- [ ] This does **not** require a vendored dependency.

If any box is unchecked, the proposal is likely out of scope.
